_notes: Clear 4-man Wing Point card. Held-out fixture for the CLEAR-CARD case. On clear cards the model reads the legible final TOTAL column reliably even though it can't read the dense per-hole grid — so we grade FINAL TOTALS only (the number that matters for settle-up), not per-hole cells. Final totals confirmed correct by the user (scan returned exactly these and they zero-sum: -76 -48 +84 +40 = 0). Signed running total after hole 18 per player.
